pis_blockers.description: Work exceeds single-PR limits. Proposed 4 stacked PRs: foundation → concurrency → webhook → ai-deduct.

rules_merge_detail: All 7 files from zedos/.cursor/rules/ merged into root .cursor/rules/72-74*.mdc and deleted. Single source of truth at root.
secrets_detail: 3 secrets leaked: DB password, NEXTAUTH_SECRET, ABACUSAI_API_KEY. User-owned rotation. Plus new STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET needed for Phase 2b.
